onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.subtitle: Pick a collection to start tracking your stickers.
onboarding.noCollections: No collections available. Add a package under public/collections.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noActivity: No activity yet. Start adding stickers!
dashboard.noCollection: Select or install a collection to begin.

filtersPanel.subtitle: Filter by team, category or rarity.
filtersPanel.hint: Changes are applied when you close the panel.

detail.noData: No extra data for this sticker.

bulk.title: Bulk import
bulk.description: Paste sticker codes, one per line or separated by spaces.

scan.title: Scan codes
scan.noCodes: No codes detected. Try a clearer photo.
scan.cameraError: Could not access camera. Check permissions.
scan.ocrHint: Point at printed sticker codes like ARG 1, BRA 12.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.duplicatesDescription: You have {{count}} stickers with more than one copy. Mark the ones you want to share.
exchange.missingDescription: You're missing {{count}} stickers. Mark the ones you want to ask for.
exchange.noDuplicatesHint: Once you have stickers with more than one copy, they'll show up here.
exchange.noMissingHint: When stickers from the active album are missing, they'll show up here.
exchange.shareBothDescription: Send your duplicates and missing in a single message. The other person pastes it and you're done.
exchange.shareBothHint: Paste the link in WhatsApp, Telegram, or wherever. If your friend has the app installed, the link opens it directly.
exchange.pasteDescription: Paste the text they sent. We auto-detect the format.
exchange.pasteAnalyzed: Done — check the summary and confirm.
exchange.pasteEmpty: The text is empty or couldn't be parsed.
exchange.pasteError: Couldn't read the clipboard. Paste the text manually.
exchange.pasteUnsupported: Your browser doesn't allow reading the clipboard. Paste the text manually.
exchange.sameCollectionRequired: That list is from a different collection. Make sure you're on the same.
exchange.tradeEmpty: No tradable stickers in this list.
exchange.tradeApplied: Done: you gave {{give}} stickers and received {{receive}} from {{partner}}.
exchange.pasteUnresolved: {{count}} couldn't be matched to the active album
exchange.pasteNoHeaders: The text has no section headers ('Missing' / 'Duplicates'). Ask your friend to re-share with the headers.

resolved.iCanGiveEmpty: — I have no duplicates of what they need
resolved.iNeedEmpty: — I'm not missing any of their duplicates
resolved.friendExtrasEmpty: — I have none of their duplicates

reservations.title: Pending reservations
reservations.description: Trades earmarked for later. Confirm or cancel when you meet up.
reservations.emptyHint: Mark a sticker as reserved or save a trade from the clipboard.
reservations.tradeConfirmed: Done: you gave {{give}} and received {{receive}} from {{partner}}.

collections.title: Collections
collections.includeExtrasHint: Affects counts and percentages for this collection.
collections.deleteConfirm: Delete this collection and all its data? This cannot be undone.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.exportDesc: Download a compressed .albumbackup of all your data.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restoring will overwrite matching collections. Continue?
backup.invalid: That file is not a valid backup.

sync.title: Sync between devices
sync.desc: Generate a QR on this phone and scan it from the other to keep stickers, scenarios and settings up to date. No internet needed.
sync.showQr: Show this QR on the other phone
sync.noData: Nothing to sync yet. Add some stickers to an active collection first.

received.title: Sync QR detected
received.from: We detected data to sync from another device.
received.missing: Some collections are not installed locally: {{ids}}

progress.title: Waiting for more QRs
progress.hint: Scan the remaining QRs from the other phone. This page updates on its own.

browserHelp.title: Open this link in the app
browserHelp.body: This QR opened in a browser tab, not the installed app.
browserHelp.hint: Install the app (use the "Install" button below) and re-scan the QR to open Panini directly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.supportHint: If this app helps you, you can support it with a transfer.
settings.collectionsHint: Manage your albums and install new collections.
settings.resetConfirm: Reset all owned quantities for this collection to zero?

donations.title: Support this project
donations.subtitle: If you want to support it, you can send ARS through Mercado Pago.
donations.name: Name
donations.promptBody: You can support development with a transfer. It helps me keep improving it.

tournament.title: Tournament
tournament.deleteScenarioConfirm: Delete the scenario "{{name}}" and all its results?

pwaInstall.banner: 📱 Add Panini to your home screen
pwaInstall.iosBody: Safari doesn't offer to install the app automatically. Follow these steps:
pwaInstall.iosStep1: Tap the Share button (square with an arrow pointing up).
pwaInstall.iosWhy: Once installed, the sync QR opens Panini directly instead of Safari.
